programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 317
programme.desc: A premium joint formula with 4g dose of collagen peptides per serving combines Hyaluronic Acid and Chondroitin to lubricate and cushion joints. NAG, a more advanced form of glucosamine. As a direct building block for Hyaluronic Acid, NAG helps cartilage retain water, reduces inflammation. Consuming both products together creates a powerful synergistic effect for joint repair.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity.

programme.title: Golden Age Talentime 2026 S2 - EP 1 / 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: After decades devoted to careers and family, these senior contestants enter a new chapter of life. Golden Age Talentime follows their journey as they rediscover long-held music dreams. The brand-new series will continue the team battle concept, creating a platform with greater diversity and excitement for the seniors to have an equal chance to stay till the end.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 575 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 13 / 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Jia Ming suspects that Situ Jiu is interested in her after noticing that he and the others deliberately let her win money to repair her violin. Ouyang Zong obstructs Zhang Tie's search for an orchestra conductor in Singapore and uses legal regulations to prevent Xiao Cheng from leaving Hong Kong.

programme.title: Every Body Knows S3 - EP 8 / 医聊大小事 S3
programme.desc: Painful periods aren’t always normal. A doctor explains endometriosis, its symptoms, causes, and impact on fertility, helping women understand when to seek help and how to manage the condition.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 14 / 前线追踪
programme.desc: Frontline is a weekly investigative current affairs programme that aims to address issues closest to the hearts of Singaporeans.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 5 / 至死不渝
programme.desc: Shuheng and Victor find Junlei at an internet café. Junlei admits to dismembering Jenna’s body but denies murdering her. The police locate her final body part, and confirms the fatal wound was on Jenna’s thigh, inflicted by a knife in the villa. A bracelet then points to Julian as the killer. Just as Victor’s team sets out to arrest him, Hongtao brings Julian in to surrender.

programme.title: Super Dad - EP 12 / 男神不败
programme.desc: Chen Kai eats a chocolate and sees a vision that Yu Yang is in danger. Yu Xin comes back flustered and tells him that Ryan has Yu Yang. Based on his vision, Chen Kai successfully locates the site but when the police arrives, Ryan shifts the blame to Yu Yang. Chen Kai tries to stop everything by stopping the time.

programme.title: 25 Memorable Old Trafford Moments
programme.desc: Relive these 25 incredible Old Trafford moments.

programme.desc: Watch all the goals from our Premier League 25/26 campaign as our new forwards enjoyed a stellar debut season.

programme.title: Inside Carrington Podcast
programme.desc: Darren Fletcher joins us for the latest episode of Inside Carrington.

programme.title: Inside Carrington Podcast
programme.desc: CEO Omar Berrada joins Andy Mitten on Inside Carrington.

programme.title: Carrick: The Players' Player
programme.desc: A special documentary on United first team star Michael Carrick. In over a decade at the club Carrick has won everything and proven to be a model professional.

programme.title: Carrick: Life Before United
programme.desc: Michael Carrick discusses his life and career prior to his move to Old Trafford in 2006. The midfielder grew up in Newcastle and later enjoyed successful stints at West Ham & Tottenham.

programme.title: Tony Whelan: The Godfather
programme.desc: Tony Whelan, our Academy Programme Advisor, speaks to Danny Webber about his legendary career as a Manchester United player, coach and mentor.

programme.title: Eric Harrison's Class of '92
programme.desc: Special documentary looking back at the fantastic FA Youth Cup winning side of 1992, that yielded the likes of Beckham, Neville and Butt.

programme.title: Star Maker: The Jimmy Murphy Story
programme.desc: On the 63rd anniversary of Munich we remember one of the greatest coaches in Manchester United history, the man who brought through the Busby Babes and let the club in the aftermath of the tragedy.

programme.title: Jimmy Murphy - Sculpting A Hero
programme.desc: Follow the emotional journey of Jimmy Murphy's statue from its conception in Edinburgh to its final resting place, proudly on the Stretford End.

programme.title: 1999: Road To European Glory
programme.desc: Re-live United's famous journey to the Nou Camp as they conquered Europe during the Treble season.

programme.title: Fergie's First XI
programme.desc: A special documentary looking back at the very first XI selected by Sir Alex Ferguson to play against Oxford United in November 1986. Presented by Jim Rosenthal.

programme.title: Leadership: Sir Alex Ferguson
programme.desc: Our former manager reveals the secrets behind his record-breaking career in his book "Leading". He discusses this and more in this special interview.

programme.title: Wembley '77: Que Sera Sera...
programme.desc: Exclusive documentary looking back at one of the most significant FA Cup finals in United's history. This is the story of how the team bounced back from defeat, in this showpiece occasion.

programme.title: Scholesy: In A League Of His Own
programme.desc: Manchester United is extremely sad that our former youth coach Eric Harrison has passed away. This is a profile of one of the many great players that Eric developed for United stardom.

programme.title: Dennis Viollet: A United Man
programme.desc: On the 60th anniversary of Munich, this is the story of prolific striker and United legend Dennis Viollet. He was part of the Busby Babes team and a Munich Air Disaster survivor.

programme.title: Sir Bobby - The Greatest
programme.desc: On the 63rd anniversary of Munich, this special documentary paid tribute to one of football's and United's all-time greats who survived the Air Disaster.

programme.title: Busby's Dream: The Triumph of '68
programme.desc: Special documentary featuring the players, fans' stories and unseen archive from one of United's greatest triumphs, the 1968 European Cup win.

programme.desc: Documentary looking back at the career of Peter Schmeichel, who is regarded by many as the greatest keeper ever to play the game.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06
programme.desc: Aera disedut ke dalam buku sebagai Si Tudung Merah. Dia berangkat melawat Nek Kura tetapi bertemu dengan Serigala. Serigala segera menculik Nek Kura, menyamar sebagai dirinya, dan menunggu ketibaan Aera.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep07
programme.desc: Nana menyelamatkan Aera tetapi terperangkap dalam buku. Di dalamnya, dia bertemu seekor Tikus yang ditangkap oleh Singa. Nana cuba meredakan keadaan dan meyakinkan Singa untuk melepaskan Tikus itu.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep08
programme.desc: Jojo tersedut ke dalam buku dan bertemu Nana serta Rubah. Mereka lihat Singa mengumpan haiwan ke gua tanpa ada yang keluar. Curiga, mereka merancang misi menyelamat, namun sesuatu tak dijangka berlaku.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep09
programme.desc: Ketika akar terus merebak di perpustakaan ajaib, Didi masuk ke dalam buku dan menjadi Kancil. Dia nampak buah di seberang sungai dan tertanya-tanya cara menyeberang—hingga Buaya muncul, mencetuskan idea.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep10
programme.desc: Portal ajaib muncul lalu menarik Nana dan Jojo ke dalam buku. Di sana, mereka bertemu Didi dan Bubu, seekor itik sedih yang melarikan diri kerana berbeza. Ketika mencari, sesuatu yang tak dijangka berlaku.

A trailer with millions of bees crashes on the streets of Los Angeles, unleashing a swarm.

Athena's only chance of surviving and saving everyone on the flight is to attempt to land the plane before it crashes and call on the 118 for help.
When it finally looks like Hen and Karen may get their foster license back, they are hit with another obstacle; the 118 races to the aid of a cheerleader involved in an infield collision.
The 118 is once again working on the spookiest night of the year and missing out on all the tricks and treats; Buck's Halloween decorations become a little scarier than he had hoped.

After years of anticipation, Maddie and Chimney's long-awaited wedding day arrives; when the groom mysteriously vanishes, the 118 races against time to ensure he doesn't miss the most crucial day of his life.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour

The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother is home from school and neglects to do the work sister has brought home; Brother teases Sister when she gets her first loose tooth.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears

programme.title: Call to Arms
programme.desc: As the aggressive Chin Empire conquers the Chao Kingdom and drains the Wei empire, adventure, intrigue and tragedy abound as the armies march into battle.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Wong Yue and Gordon Liu star in this entertaining 'hopping vampire' action comedy.

programme.title: The Golden Buddha
programme.desc: A ruthless gang goes up against a millionaire's daughter who has one of three priceless Golden Buddha statues.

programme.title: The Yellow Muffler
programme.desc: This Inoue Umetsugu musical depicts the struggle of two singing sisters, Ching Ping and Pai Hung.

programme.title: Chinatown Kid
programme.desc: A man on the run (Fu Sheng) learns that heroism is likely to lead to nihilistic desecration.

programme.title: The Kingdom and the Beauty
programme.desc: Catch superstar, Linda Lin Dai, in one of her most acclaimed roles in this story of forbidden love between a country maiden and the emperor.

programme.title: The Eight Diagram Pole Fighter
programme.desc: Martial arts greats Lau Kar Leung and Alexander Fu play out the vendetta of General Yang and the creation of the unique eight-diagram pole fight technique.

programme.title: Asia-pol
programme.desc: Asiapol agent Yang Ming Hsuan sets out to apprehend George Eaton, a high profile thug who has escaped to Hong Kong. With home support, can Yang take him down?

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Director Chang Cheh joins forces with Ni Kuang and martial arts choreographer Liu Chia-liang to craft this brilliant saga from the golden age of kung fu films.

programme.title: The Happiest Moment
programme.desc: Directed by Lee Han-hsiang and starring Michael Hui, this blockbuster confirms Hui's versatile talents as the king of comedy.

programme.title: Brothers From the Walled City
programme.desc: The lives of two very different brothers intertwine when they find themselves the target of a vengeful inspector.

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: A traitorous clansman bids to locate and then unleash the deadly 'Five Venom Spider' against those who bid to stand in his way.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Directed by Ho Meng Hua, this film depicts the currents that buoy two families, sweeping them toward revenge in the wake of an unexpected reunion.

programme.title: Love With the Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: Pauline Wong plays a pregnant student who marries a sympathetic, yet equally heartbroken, passer-by in Jamie Luk's directing debut.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Betty Ting Pei plays a girl hiding from her father while working as a club singer in Japan. Then her father sends someone for her only for the man to fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Lady Hermit
programme.desc: A pair of female martial artists end up banding together to go up against the evil Black Demon. Starring Cheng Pei Pei.

programme.title: Na Cha the Great
programme.desc: A young rebel goes into legend after being reincarnated to save his people from their tyrannical emperor.

programme.title: The Sword Stained With Royal Blood
programme.desc: Havoc dogs a swordsman who uncovers a sword, training manual, treasure map and a secret message on the body of a deceased master.

programme.title: Human Lanterns
programme.desc: An insane swordsman takes to making Chinese lamps from the skin of his enemies' sisters, mistresses and wives!

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: A gutsy lass (Kara Hui Ying-Hung) becomes a kung-fu family's matriarch so that its dastardly Third Uncle won't get the inheritance.

programme.title: Return of the Phoenix
programme.desc: In this masterpiece from Li Han Hsiang, sparks fly when minister Cheng Pu decides to marry off his youngest daughter before his eldest one.

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: While returning the stolen Golden Sword to the palace, a sword master's daughter is pursued and poisoned by an evil master, only to return as a spirit to take revenge against the evildoer.

programme.title: When the Clouds Roll by
programme.desc: A doctor falls for a schizophrenic old classmate he's treating who refuses to accept that her lover is dead.

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: A hero (Chen Kuan Tai) battles assassins who use a deadly, beheading weapon to kill dissidents.

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: This seminal film adaptation of a 17th century Pu Songling work is the precursor of the famed 'A Chinese Ghost Story'.

programme.title: The Proud Youth
programme.desc: This fascinating story of conflicting clans marks the beginning of Sun Chung's exploration of the kung fu genre.

programme.title: Man of Iron
programme.desc: In this fight-filled sequel, Chen Kuan-tai's character wins a bet against a gang leader's son. Soon, father and son are hot on his heels!

programme.title: Come Drink With Me
programme.desc: King Hu's groundbreaking film set the foundation for all his action films that followed, most notably Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon.

programme.title: Mukhlis
programme.desc: Haikal/Mukhlis yang menyesal tentang kehidupan sosialnya yang lalu. Apabila mengetahui beliau tidak boleh hidup lama, Haikal/Mukhlis berusaha memperbaiki diri, membuat amalan dan kebajikan. Lakonan : Shanaaz Ahmad, Elfaeza Ul Haq dan Norlia Ghani.

programme.title: Al-Kisah
programme.desc: Sebuah sitkom komedi yang mengisahkan pelbagai latar cerita masyarakat di Malaysia.

programme.title: Gala 2
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama Mas Idayu dan artis jemputan yang akan menghiburkan penonton dengan lagu-lagu popular mereka.

programme.title: Yong Odah Che Melah
programme.desc: Ikuti gelagat Yong Odah dan Che Melah, yang tinggal berjiran, tapi saling bermusuhan. Namun apabila rumahtangga masing-masing menghadapi masalah, mereka melupakan sengketa yang terjadi dan berganding bahu mencari jalan penyelesaian. Lakonan : Wan Maimunah, Kismah Johari, Fathil Dhani dan Kazar.

programme.title: Darah Putih Jambu
programme.desc: Kisah liku-liku rintangan hubungan Siti Hajar dan Raymond yang mendapat tentangan daripada Datuk Siti Hajar kerana Raymond seorang pemuda Inggeris dan berbeza agama. Lakonan : Baby Farahlia, Geofrey Williams, Baharuddin Omar dan Wan Maimunah.

programme.title: Anak Kerbau Mati Emak
programme.desc: Sebuah drama komedi yang mengisahkan pelbagai latar cerita masyarakat di Malaysia.

programme.title: Ketipang Payung
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang mengimbau dan mengupas sejarah tarian dalam filem-filem Melayu klasik era 50-an dan 60-an.

programme.title: Cinta Antara Kita
programme.desc: Drama bersiri yang memaparkan tentang hubungan kekeluargaan, persahabatan dan percintaan.

programme.title: Idola
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama Fairuz Hussein yang akan menghiburkan penonton dengan lagu-lagu beliau.

programme.title: Suaramu
programme.desc: Hanya mendengar suara di telefon, Anuar terus jatuh cinta kepada Jaja seorang Pegawai Khidmat Pelanggan di sebuah bank. Lakonan : Arash Mohamad, Julia Ziengler dan Syed Ali.

programme.title: Seadanya Sayang
programme.desc: Drama kemasyarakatan yang memaparkan hubungan kekeluargaan, persahabatan dan percintaan.

programme.title: Klip Video
programme.desc: Seleksi klip - klip video terbaik untuk anda.

programme.title: Khazanah Sarawak
programme.desc: Bersama pengacara Rashid Salleh menyelusuri keunikan seni kraftangan tradisional pelbagai kaum di Sarawak serta mengetahui kisah para penggiat seni tempatan yang terus berusaha memastikan warisan ini terus terpelihara.

programme.desc: Crabapple Jam makes an announcement that threatens life at the Berryworks forever; Strawberry and her friends find themselves fired from the Berryworks as Crabapple Jam transforms it into her very own Crabappleworks.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake: Berry in the Big City

programme.desc: Buns saves a cricket during a soccer game.

programme.title: Max & Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby wants to make her diorama special; Ruby wants to play a game of croquet; Ruby wants to get through Mrs. H's special exercise regime.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While enjoying a tea break, Mr. Bull accidentally breaks his delicate teapot; he takes the pieces to Miss Rabbit to be fixed.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger mistakenly believes that Cap'n Turbot's new weather blimp actually changes the weather, he swipes the floating aircraft.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 26
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 4
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 5
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. programme.desc: ACP Aravind faces a bizarre case, a limping, raincoated figure with a shovel attacks people like a zombie. As fear spreads, Aravind must uncover the truth behind this eerie menace and its violent behaviour

programme.title: Sethu
programme.desc: A violent college student softens his tough exterior when he falls in love with a shy Brahmin woman. However, tragedy strikes when he suffers a serious brain injury in a brutal fight. Starring Vikram

programme.title: Paramapadham Vilayattu
programme.desc: When a politician mysteriously dies in her care, Dr Gayathri decides to investigate. However, when she learns of the conspiracy behind his death, she must decide whether to speak up or not.

programme.title: Uttama Villain
programme.desc: Manoranjan, a superstar, is diagnosed with a brain tumour. However, as a last wish, he sets out to shoot a comedy film with his mentor, Margadarsi, with whom he had a falling out years ago.

programme.title: Samar
programme.desc: Shankar and Roopa fall in love with each other but she suddenly ends their relationship and moves out of the country. Shankar receives a mysterious invitation from Roopa to come to Bangkok. Starring Vishal

programme.title: Unnai Ninaithu
programme.desc: Radha, the daughter of a hotel manager, falls in love with Suriya, who works as a receptionist. However, things turn upside down when Suriya's ex-lover comes back to his life. Starring Suriya and Sneha.

programme.title: Kuselan
programme.desc: A poor barber lives a peaceful and content life with his caring wife and beautiful kids; but he faces a dilemma when his childhood friend returns to his village as a popular movie star.Starring Rajinikanth

programme.title: Kadhalukku Mariyadhai
programme.desc: Jeeva loves Mini but her three brothers end up beating him every time he meets her. The couple decides to elope against their parents' wishes. Cast : Vijay & Shalini

programme.title: Mynaa
programme.desc: Having fallen for Mynaa, a girl he has taken pity on, Suruli is infuriated when Mynaa's mother arranges for her to marry another man. However, can he stop this? Cast : Viddharth & Amala Paul

programme.title: Asvins

programme.title: Love

programme.title: The Lego Movie
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Optimus Prime seeks his creator in space. Meanwhile, humans and Autobots join forces to save Earth from an ancient threat.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
programme.desc: Bestowed with superpowers, Shazam and his foster siblings join forces against the daughters of Atlas who have stolen the Wizard's broken staff.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Stuck in the middle of the conflict between Dementus and Immortan Joe, Furiosa fights to escape from their clutches and return to her safe haven, the Green Place.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: When an advanced cyber weapon is on the verge of falling into the wrong hands, Ethan Hunt and his team must embark on a challenging mission to save the world from destruction.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.desc: While on a business tour, circumstances force a married man to marry another woman. However, his first wife happens to learn about his second marriage.

programme.title: Pennin Manathai Thottu
programme.desc: Sunil is a renowned heart surgeon, while Sunita has a child with a heart problem. When she meets Sunil, she lashes out at him, blaming him for her plight, as he had betrayed her many years ago.

programme.title: Majunu
programme.desc: Vasanth, son of an MP, falls in love with Heena, who is believed to be the main suspect behind a bomb attack on his father. Vasanth secretly helps her return to Kolkata and soon follows to meet her.

programme.title: Maaveeran

programme.title: Kannodu Kanbathellam

programme.title: Theechatti Govindan

programme.title: Thirudi

programme.title: Vaitheeswaran
